subject: Consul Stateful Set
commit_message:
Consul Stateful Set

Issue-ID: OOM-1032

Change-Id: I911085dffc35067d844b5dcb286581fa0897a27a
Signed-off-by: Priyanka Jain <Priyanka.Jain3@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Do we need to add PV for the statefulSet? Otherwise, why do we need statefulSet?

Patch Set 4:

Stateful set of consul servers come up. But unable to access UI (30270:/ui).

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

kubectl -n onap get pods -o=wide -a | grep consul
dev-consul-6bcbf4d87f-4glwh                     1/1       Running     2          4m          10.42.194.172   sb6-k8s-2
dev-consul-server-0                             1/1       Running     0          4m   10.42.49.128    sb6-k8s-3
dev-consul-server-1                             1/1       Running     0          4m          10.42.60.210    sb6-k8s-4
dev-consul-server-2                             1/1       Running     0          4m          10.42.254.161   sb6-k8s-2
[

Patch Set 5:

> Uploaded patch set 5.

Now any instance could be leader. 
Also it's scalable as per the replicacount of consul-server.

onap3         consul-consul-57d8c7c86f-4dsz9            1/1       Running    0          3m
onap3         consul-consul-server-0                    1/1       Running    0          3m
onap3         consul-consul-server-1                    1/1       Running    0          3m
onap3         consul-consul-server-2                    1/1       Running    0          2m

Patch Set 5:

root@k8s-1:~/Mahendra/OOM_Consul_15May/oom/kubernetes# kubectl exec -itn onap3         consul-consul-57d8c7c86f-4dsz9 sh
/ # consul members
Node                            Address            Status  Type    Build  Protocol  DC   Segment
consul-consul-server-0          10.42.136.25:8301  alive   server  1.0.6  2         dc1  <all>
consul-consul-server-1          10.42.78.53:8301   alive   server  1.0.6  2         dc1  <all>
consul-consul-server-2          10.42.24.197:8301  alive   server  1.0.6  2         dc1  <all>
consul-consul-57d8c7c86f-4dsz9  10.42.249.93:8301  alive   client  1.0.6  2         dc1  <default>
/ # consul operator raft list-peers
Node                    ID                                    Address            State     Voter  RaftProtocol
consul-consul-server-0  b49b6b7c-e393-7eef-89d6-6181c7de0333  10.42.136.25:8300  leader    true   3
consul-consul-server-1  97c0b172-9ffc-5806-1869-6428bf36becd  10.42.78.53:8300   follower  true   3
consul-consul-server-2  adc3f6ef-4230-dd5b-77f4-9ccd3f2e6fb7  10.42.24.197:8300  follower  true   3
/ #
